arts.ttl: Tottenham is a club consumed by angst and identity confusion, writes IAN LADYMAN - and why Daniel Levy is at the heart of it all
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: Ten minutes before the end of their team's last Premier League home game against Chelsea, two Tottenham fans scuffled at the back of the South Stand.

arts.ttl: Tottenham ready to make major change as Daniel Levy wants to beat Chelsea to £162m kit deal
